let bookAttribute = java.getString(".book-info-top@p.book-attribute@html"); let intro = java.getString(".book-info-top@p.intro@html"); let count = java.getString(".book-info-top@p.count@html"); let bookIntroDetail = java.getString("p#book-intro-detail@html"); let allLabel = java.getString("p.all-label@html"); let writerName = java.getString("a.writer-name@href"); let currentVar = book.getVariable("custom") || ""; if (!currentVar.includes("author")) { book.putCustomVariable(`${writerName}`); } `

${bookAttribute}

${intro}

${count}


作品简介

${bookIntroDetail}


${allLabel}

`

bookSourceComment:
本书源修改自关耳010225
现在能看的VIP章节url的versionCode最大是381

‼️一定要点一次登录右上角的✓，确保登陆头里有versionCode的参数

ruleBookInfo.author: $.authorName
ruleBookInfo.intro:
novelId = java.getString("$.novelId"); authorId = java.getString("$.authorId"); authorName = java.getString("$.authorName"); authorNote = getAuthorNote(authorName); isVip = java.getString("$.isVip"); if (novelId) { cache.putMemory('jj_isVip_' + novelId, isVip == '1' ? '1' : '0'); } let currentVar = book.getVariable("custom") || ""; if (!currentVar.includes("authorId=")) { book.putCustomVariable(`authorId=${authorId}`); } novelTags = String(java.getString("$.novelTags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|,(?=\S)/g, "🏷️"); mainview = java.getString("$.mainview"); protagonist = java.getString("$.protagonist"); costar = java.getString("$.costar"); other = java.getString("$.other"); novelIntroShort = java.getString("$.novelIntroShort"); comment_count = String(java.getString("$.comment_count")).replace(/\D/, ""); novelbefavoritedcount = java.getString("$.novelbefavoritedcount"); nutrition_novel = java.getString("$.nutrition_novel"); fullIntro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro")); parts = fullIntro.split(/立意:/); novelIntro = parts[0]; littleintro = parts.length > 1 ? "立意:" + parts.slice(1).join("立意:") : ""; OtherInfoUrl = "http://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/getnovelOtherInfo?novelId=" + novelId + "&type=novelbasicinfo&versionCode=" + Map("versionCode"); B = JSON.parse(java.ajax(OtherInfoUrl)); // 完结评分 novelreview = B.novelreview; novelreview = novelreview.match(/\d分/) ? novelreview : ""; // 抽奖 novelidPrizeTitle = B.novelidPrize.data.novelidPrizeTitle; novelidPrizeCondition = B.novelidPrize.data.novelidPrizeCondition headcount = B.novelidPrize.data.headcount; prize = B.novelidPrize.data.prize; reasonfordraw = B.novelidPrize.data.reasonfordraw; novelidPrize = "" + novelidPrizeTitle + "
" + reasonfordraw + "
" + novelidPrizeCondition + "　" + headcount + "　" + prize + ""; novelidPrize = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(novelidPrizeTitle) ? novelidPrize + "
‎" : ""; // 请假条 leaveDateBack = B.novelLeave.leaveDateBack; leaveContent = B.novelLeave.leaveContent; leaveDate = B.novelLeave.leaveDate; novelLeave = "" + leaveDateBack + "
" + leaveContent + "
" + leaveDate + ""; novelLeave = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(leaveDateBack) ? novelLeave + "
‎" : ""; INTRO = `

作者备注：${authorNote}

${novelLeave}

${novelidPrize}

标签：${novelTags}

一句话简介：${novelIntroShort}

视角：${mainview}

主角：${protagonist.replace("主角：", "").trim()}

配角：${costar.replace("配角：", "").trim()}

其它：${other.replace("其它：", "").trim()}

立意：${littleintro.replace("立意:", "").trim()}

评论：${comment_count}

收藏：${novelbefavoritedcount}

灌溉：${nutrition_novel}

评分：${novelreview}


作品简介

${novelIntro.replace(/\n/g, "
")}

` ##\\\s|\\[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2,}：\\\s|\\\作者备注：\\\\s
ruleBookInfo.name: $.novelName

ruleContent.content:
function decode() { let response = java.get(baseUrl, {}); let content = String(response.body()); isPay = !/"content"/.test(content); if (isPay) { let accesskey = String(response.header("accesskey")); let keyString = String(response.header("keystring")); let accesskeyLen = accesskey.length; let v6 = accesskey.charCodeAt(accesskeyLen - 1); let v9 = 0; for (var i = 0; i < accesskey.length; i++) { v9 += accesskey.charCodeAt(i) } let v15 = v9 % keyString.length; let v17 = Math.floor(v9 / 65); let v18 = keyString.length; let v43 = keyString.substring(v15, v17 + v15 > v18 ? v18 : v17 + v15); let v32 = content.length; let [v38, dest] = (v6 & 1) !== 0 ? [content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest) } return content } extend = book.getVariable("custom"); if (!/versionCode/.test(baseUrl)) { content = java.getString("$.content"); upDown = java.getString("$.upDown"); saybody = java.getString("$.sayBody"); message = java.getString("$.message"); } else { if (/content/.test(result)) { java.setContent(result); } else { java.setContent(decode()); } content = java.getString("$..content"); if (String(content).length > 30) { content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content); } else { content = ""; } upDown = java.getString("$..upDown"); saybody = java.getString("$..sayBodyV2"); message = java.getString("$..message"); buy_ratio = java.getString("$..buy_ratio"); reader_buy_ratio = java.getString("$..reader_buy_ratio"); }; chapterintro = java.get("chapterintro"); pointMeassge = java.get("pointmeassge"); content1 = `\t${chapterintro}\n${message}`; if (pointMeassge != "0晋江币") { content1 += "\n价格：" + pointMeassge + "（APP专享价）"; } if (/免费赠送的福利番外/.test(message)) { content1 += "\n本福利番外赠送给正文订阅率达到" + buy_ratio + "的读者\n您截止至上一章的正文订阅率：" + reader_buy_ratio; } content = content != "" ? String(content).replace(/

|\n\n/g,"
‎
") : ""; saybody = replaceEmoticons(String(saybody)).replace(/src="(.*?)"/g, 'src="$1,{"style":"TEXT"}"'); saybody = saybody != "" && (extend.includes("开启作话") || Map("saybodySwitch") != "关闭作话") ? `\t▍作者有话说：\n${saybody}` : ""; Content = content == "" ? content1 : (upDown == "0" ? `${saybody}\n‎\n${content}` : `${content}\n${saybody}`);
ruleContent.replaceRegex:
<js>
let jjsl = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
let isParagraphEnabled = Map("paragraphSwitch");
let versionCode = Map("versionCode");

if (!isParagraphEnabled && /开启.?段评/.test(jjsl)) {
	jjsl = jjsl.replace(/开启.?段评/g, '').trim();
	book.putCustomVariable(jjsl);
	java.toast("⚠️ 全局段评已关闭，已清除本书的段评开启标记");
}

try {
	if (!/关闭本书段评/.test(jjsl)) {
		let shouldShowParagraph = false;
		if (isParagraphEnabled || /开启.?段评/.test(jjsl)) {
			shouldShowParagraph = true;
			if (!/开启•段评/.test(jjsl)) {
				baseUrl = bDe(baseUrl);
				cid = baseUrl.match(/chapterId=(\d+)/)[1];
				nid = baseUrl.match(/novelId=(\d+)/)[1];

				let checkurl = `https://android.jjwxc.com/app.jjwxc/android/reading/authorNovelSetting/getSetting?versionCode=${versionCode}&novelid=${nid}&setting_type=author_paragraph_comment_switch,{"headers":{"versionCode":"${versionCode}"}}`;
				let checkparagraph = JSON.parse(java.ajax(checkurl))?.data?.paragraph_switch;

				if (checkparagraph == "1") {
					book.putCustomVariable(/开启段评/.test(jjsl) ? jjsl.replace(/开启段评/, "开启•段评") : jjsl + "\n开启•段评");
					java.toast("本书作者已开启段评功能");
				} else if (checkparagraph == "0") {
					book.putCustomVariable(/开启段评/.test(jjsl) ? jjsl.replace(/开启段评/, "关闭本书段评") : jjsl + "\n关闭本书段评");
					java.toast("本书作者没有开启段评功能，已自动在【书籍变量】中关闭段评");
					shouldShowParagraph = false;
				}
			}

			if (shouldShowParagraph) {
				baseUrl = bDe(baseUrl);
				cid = baseUrl.match(/chapterId=(\d+)/)[1];
				nid = baseUrl.match(/novelId=(\d+)/)[1];
				let getNovelParagraph = `https://android.jjwxc.com/app.jjwxc/android/reading/comment/getNovelParagraphCommentNum?versionCode=${versionCode}&novelid=${nid}&token=${Map("token")}&chapterid=${cid},{"headers":{"versionCode":"${versionCode}"}}`;

				let $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getNovelParagraph));
				let datalength = $.data.length;

				if (datalength) {
					let pid = 1;
					let jsonData = $.data;
					let list = result.split("\n");
					let processedList = "";

					for (i in list) {
						let item = list[i];
						if (/^[\s　]*[\u200B-\u200F\u202A-\u202E\uFEFF]?[\s　]*$/.test(item) || /^\s*$/.test(item)) {
							processedList += "\n" + item + "\n";
						} else {
							let matchedPara = jsonData.find(p => p.paragraph_id == String(pid) || (String(p.paragraph_id) == "-2" && /作者有话说/.test(item)));
							if (matchedPara) {
								processedList += `${item}${getImage(matchedPara.comment_total,matchedPara.paragraph_id)}\n`;
							} else {
								processedList += item + "\n";
							}
							pid++;
						}
					}
					result = processedList;
				}
			}
		}
	}
} catch (e) {
	java.log("段评处理错误: " + e);
}
result
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.authorName||$.authorname
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let isQianziBang = baseUrl.includes("favObservationByDate");
let list = [];
let filteredList = [];
let rankMap = {};

if (isQianziBang) {
	list = java.getElements("$.data.list[*]");
	cache.deleteMemory('jj_rank_map');
	
	if (list.length > 0) {
		for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
			let item = list[i];
			let id = item.novelId || item.novelid;
			if (id) {
				let recommendInfo = item.recommendInfo || item.recommendinfo || "{}";
				try {
					let rec = JSON.parse(recommendInfo);
					let rank = parseInt(rec.recommendIndex) + 1;
					if (!isNaN(rank)) {
						rankMap[id] = rank;
					}
				} catch (e) {
					rankMap[id] = i + 1;
				}
			}
		}
		cache.putMemory('jj_rank_map', JSON.stringify(rankMap));
	}
	
	for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
		let item = list[i];
		let cls = String(item.novelClass || item.novelclass || "");
		if (!cls.includes("纯爱") && !cls.includes("男主")) {
			filteredList.push(item);
		}
	}
} else {
	list = java.getElements("$..[?(@.novelName)]&&$..[?(@.novelname)]");
	for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
		let item = list[i];
		let cls = String(item.novelClass || item.type || "");
		if (!cls.includes("纯爱") && !cls.includes("男主")) {
			filteredList.push(item);
		}
	}
}

filteredList;
</js>
ruleExplore.intro:
<js>
intro2 = java.getString("$.novelIntroShort||$.novelintroshort");
tags = String(java.getString("$.tags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|[,]|\s(?=\S)/g,"🏷️");
remarks = java.getString("$.remarks");
remarks = remarks == "" ? "" : "　📝备注：" + remarks;

authorName = java.getString("$.authorName||$.authorname");
authorNote = getAuthorNote(authorName);

intro = intro2 + remarks;
if (authorNote) {
	intro += "\n" + authorNote;
}
intro += "\n‎\n" + tags;

if (baseUrl.includes("VipService")) {
	intro = "订阅全文：" + java.getString("$.buytotal");
}
</js>
ruleExplore.kind:
<js>
novelClass = String(java.getString("$.novelClass||$.novelclass||$.type"));
novelStep = getNovelStatusByMap(java.getString("$.novelStep||$.novelstep"));
chapterDateNewest = java.getString("$.chapterdateNewest||$.newtopdate");

let bookId = java.getString("$.novelId||$.novelid");
let rankStr = "";
let rankMapStr = cache.getFromMemory('jj_rank_map');
if (rankMapStr) {
	let rankMap = JSON.parse(rankMapStr);
	let rank = rankMap[bookId];
	if (rank) {
		if (rank == 1) rankStr = "🥇";
		else if (rank == 2) rankStr = "🥈";
		else if (rank == 3) rankStr = "🥉";
		else if (rank <= 10) rankStr = "🏅";
		else rankStr = "📊";
		rankStr = rankStr + "第" + rank + "名,";
	}
}

kind = `${rankStr}${novelClass},${novelStep}${chapterDateNewest ? `,${chapterDateNewest}` : ""}`;
</js>##0000-00-00 00:00:00
ruleExplore.name: $.novelName||$.novelname

ruleSearch.author: $.authorname
ruleSearch.intro:
<js>
intro2 = java.getString("$.novelintroshort");
tags = String(java.getString("$.tags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|\s/g,"🏷️");
authorName = java.getString("$.authorname");
authorNote = getAuthorNote(authorName);

intro = intro2;
if (authorNote) {
	intro += "\n" + authorNote;
}
intro += "\n‎\n" + tags;
</js>
ruleSearch.name: $.novelname

ruleToc.chapterName:
<js>
name = java.getString("$.chaptername");
chaptertype = java.getString("$.chaptertype");
pointMeassge = java.getString("$.pointMeassge");
chapterMessage = java.getString("$.chapterMessage") == "福利番外" ? "🧧[福利番外]" : "";
java.put("pointmeassge", pointMeassge);
chapterid = java.getString("$.chapterid");
islock = +java.getString("$.islock") ? "🔒[锁]" : "";
isvip = +java.getString("$.isvip") ? "💸" : "";
if (chaptertype == "0") {
	chaptername = String(name).replace(/[【]?第\s?\d+\s?章[】]?\s*|[第]?[〇零一二三四五六七八九十百千万两□]+章\s*|(?=^)\d+(?=$)|福利番外/g, "");
	chaptername = `${isvip}第${chapterid}章 ${chaptername}${chaptername == "" ? chapterMessage : " " + chapterMessage}${chaptername == "" ? islock : " " + islock}`;
} else {
	volumename = `📜${name}`;
}
</js>
ruleToc.chapterUrl:
<js>
token = Map("token");
novelid = java.getString("$.novelid");
chapterid = java.getString("$.chapterid");
isvip = java.getString("$.isvip");
chaptertype = java.getString("$.chaptertype");
if (isvip == "0") {
	url = "https://app-cdn.jjwxc.com/androidapi/chapterContent?novelId=" + novelid + "&chapterId=" + chapterid;
} else {
	url = "https://app-cdn.jjwxc.com/androidapi/chapterContent?novelId=" + novelid + "&versionCode=381&token=" + token + "&chapterId=" + chapterid;
};
chapterUrl = chaptertype == "0" ? url : "";
</js>

variableComment: 在登录里设置了关闭作话之后，在【书籍变量】里填写“开启作话”可以单独开启本书作者有话说

bookSourceComment: 在【正文页面】点击定制按钮可以加入书架 在【登录】输入token即可登陆查看收藏的作者； 目录 更新时间（不用的代码）：[-](?=[一-龥]) 正文：A = ''+" "+novelTags+" "+mainview+" "+protagonist+" "+costar+" "+other+" "+novelIntroShort+" "+novelIntro1+" "+commentcount+" "+novelbefavoritedcount+" ‎ "+novelIntro+" ‎ "+"【"+novelId+"】"+" "+"【"+codeUrl+"】"

ruleBookInfo.name: td[height='40']@span.volumnfont@ownText##^\s*

ruleContent.content:
<js>
islock = java.getString("$.islock");
if(islock == "0") {
	novelStep = java.getString("$.novelStep");
	novelStatus = novelStep == "0" ? "暂停" : (novelStep == "1" ? "连载" : "完结");
	novelClass = java.getString("$.novelClass");
	novelTags = String(java.getString("$.novelTags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|,(?=\S)/g,"🏷️");
	mainview = "视角："+java.getString("$.mainview");
	protagonist = String(java.getString("$.protagonist"));
	costar = String(java.getString("$.costar"));
	other= String(java.getString("$.other"));
	novelIntroShort = "一句话简介："+java.getString("$.novelIntroShort");
	fullIntro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro"));
	parts = fullIntro.split(/立意:/);
	novelIntro = parts[0];
	littleintro = parts.length > 1 ? "立意:" + parts.slice(1).join("立意:") : "";
	comment_count = "评论："+String(java.getString("$.comment_count")).replace(/\,/g,"");
	novelbefavoritedcount = "收藏："+java.getString("$.novelbefavoritedcount");
	nutrition_novel = "灌溉："+java.getString("$.nutrition_novel");
	novelId = String(java.getString("$.novelId"));
	A =  novelClass+"　"+novelStatus+"\n"+novelTags+"\n"+mainview+"\n"+protagonist+"\n"+costar+"\n"+other+"\n"+novelIntroShort+"\n"+littleintro+"\n"+comment_count+"\n"+novelbefavoritedcount+"\n"+nutrition_novel+"\n‎\n"+novelIntro;
	} else {
	message = java.getString("$.message");
	}
</js>

ruleExplore.intro:
<js>
renew = java.getString("$.renew.novelName");
renewdate = java.getString("$.renew.renewdate");
favorite = java.getString("$.favorite.novelName");
favoriteEnd = java.getString("$.favoriteEnd.novelName");

`最新更新：《${renew}》　${renewdate}\n最热小说：《${favorite}》\n完结佳作：《${favoriteEnd}》`;
</js>
##\s?.{4}：《》
ruleExplore.kind:
<js>
authorSign = java.getString("$.authorSign");
signStatus = authorSign == 0 ? "未签约作者" : "签约作者";

favoriteNum = java.getString("$.favoriteNum");
multiplescore = java.getString("$.multiplescore");

let a1 = `被收藏数：${favoriteNum}`;
let a2 = multiplescore != "" ? `, 总积分：${multiplescore}` : "";

`${a1}${a2}, ${signStatus}`;
</js>
